title: Point Reyes Light — May 30, 1974 (Page 7)
author: Point Reyes Light Staff
card_summary: A single page from the Point Reyes Light, a weekly community newspaper serving Point Reyes Station, California, dated May 30, 1974, Page 7. This issue falls in the period following PKD's pivotal 2-3-74 experiences and his return from Vancouver. Issues from this paper are archived as contextual documents relating to the communities and locales significant to PKD's life.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the Point Reyes Light (Point Reyes Station, California), dated Thursday, May 30, 1974, page 7. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 4, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

The date of May 1974 is significant in Dick studies: Dick's transformative 2-3-74 mystical experiences had occurred just months earlier in February and March 1974, events that would dominate his philosophical thinking and writing for the remainder of his life. By this time Dick had left Marin County and was living in Orange County, but this clipping from his former community may contain references relevant to understanding the world he had inhabited.
